emptyText: Tags cut across characters, locations and factions — “cursed”, “house-vale”, “plot-critical”. Create the first one to start weaving threads.
detailHint: Select a tag to see and edit its details.
attachNote: Attach tags to entries from a character, location or faction page.

form.deleteConfirm: Delete tag “{{name}}”? It will be removed from every entry that carries it.
form.saveFailed: Saving failed. Tag names are unique per world.
